acquisition method: A method referred to as parallel reaction monitoring (PRM)
alkylation reagent: 10 μL of 100 mM IAA was added
alkylation concentration: 10 μL of 100 mM IAA was added
cleavage agent: For the tryptic digestion, trypsin (Sequencing grade modified, Promega, Madison, WI, USA) was used.
collision energy: Fragmentation was performed with normalized collision energy (NCE) of 27 eV.
fractionation method: gel fractionation was performed to concentrate the target proteins...
fragmentation method: the 10 most abundant ion peaks were CID fragmented for each full scan cycle.
instrument: The PRM analyses were performed on a Q Exactive Plus Orbitrap mass spectrometer...
labeling: mass spectrometry (MS) is an attractive alternative due to high specificity and versatility, allowing for species-independent analysis.
reduction reagent: dithiothreitol (DTT) and iodoacetamide (IAA) were obtained from Sigma-Aldrich...
reduction concentration: 10 μL of 45 mM DTT was added...
